segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt path through a tall grass field at night. A large leafy bush is visible on the left side while distant trees form a dark silhouette on the horizon.

entered.detail: clusters of red wildflowers scattered in the grass on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the path as the bush on the left passes out of view behind the camera. Red wildflowers become visible in the grass on both sides of the trail as the walk progresses through the open field.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a narrow dirt path through a dark field that gradually reveals vibrant floral details. It begins with a walk past a large leafy bush on the left, while distant trees form a dark silhouette against the night horizon. As the camera progresses, the bush recedes behind the viewer, opening up the perspective of the surrounding landscape. The scene then shifts to reveal scattered red wildflowers blooming within the tall grass on both sides of the trail. This movement continues steadily forward, transitioning from the shelter of the foliage into the open, flower-dotted expanse of the field.
